EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ITopologicalSegment2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that extend the ITopologicalSegment interface.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("FE736C24-01DA-11D4-9F6C-00C04F6BDD7F")]
public interface ITopologicalSegment2 : ITopologicalSegment, ISegment, ICurve, IGeometry
